thresholds.rationale: Smoke floor for setup plus 200 deterministic random-legal actions at 2 seats.
Smoke floor for setup plus 500 deterministic random-legal actions at the default 4 seats.
Smoke floor for legal action tree, apply, and all-viewer projection at max 6 seats.
Smoke floor for discard-pile pickup action generation over a long visible discard tail.
Smoke floor for public plus all six seat-private view projection over a larger meld tableau.
Smoke floor for viewer-scoped export/import across public and six seat-private viewers.
Smoke floor for Level 0 random legal bot decisions.
Gate 19 Level 1 is not admitted; this lane keeps the profile visible without claiming a strategic policy.
